Companion

Mate 2.0 redefines how you interact with intelligent systems. Fast, open, and built for everyone — from developers to creators.

Built for the
next generation

Mate started as a vision to make powerful AI accessible to everyone. Today, it's a thriving open-source ecosystem driven by a global community of developers, creators, and innovators.

Founded2024
Open SourceMIT License
Built WithTypeScript, Rust, Python
50k+
Lines of Code
200+
Contributors
30+
Integrations
99.9%
Uptime

Everything you
need to succeed

Packed with powerful features to supercharge your workflow.

Lightning Fast

Optimized inference pipeline delivers responses in milliseconds, not seconds.

Privacy First

Your data stays yours. End-to-end encryption and local processing options.

Multi-Modal

Understands text, images, code, and audio. One model, endless possibilities.

Plugin System

Extend functionality with a rich ecosystem of community-built plugins.

Developer API

RESTful and GraphQL APIs with SDKs in Python, JS, Rust, and Go.

Collaborative

Real-time shared sessions. Work together with your team in the same thread.
